SEARCH

Package opennlp.tools.ml.libsvm.doccat

package opennlp.tools.ml.libsvm.doccat
  • Class
    Description
    DocumentCategorizerSVM
    An implementation of DocumentCategorizer that uses Support Vector Machines (SVM) via the zlibsvm library for document classification.
    FeatureSelectionStrategy
    Defines strategies for selecting the most informative features for SVM-based text classification.
    SvmDoccatConfiguration
    Configuration for SVM-based document categorization, combining the underlying SVM classifier settings with text-specific parameters for term weighting, feature selection, and feature scaling.
    SvmDoccatConfiguration.Builder
    A builder for SvmDoccatConfiguration.
    SvmDoccatModel
    A model for SVM-based document categorization.
    SvmDoccatModel.DeserializationLimits
    Resource limits applied to the ObjectInputFilter used by SvmDoccatModel.deserialize(InputStream, DeserializationLimits).
    TermWeightingStrategy
    Defines strategies for weighting term features in SVM-based text classification.
